twitter_thread: 45% of single parents rely on freelance work, with top earners making $5K/month on Upwork.
To generate an extra $2K-$3K/month, focus on high-demand skills like content writing ($30/hour) or virtual assistance ($25/hour).
Online tutoring on TutorMe or Chegg can pay up to $20/hour, with experienced tutors earning $40/hour.
Selling products on eBay or Poshmark can yield $1K-$2K/month, with top sellers earning $5K/month.
Pricing mistake: charging $15/hour when you could earn $30/hour. Use tools like Trello to track your time and adjust rates.
Top freelancers use tools like Asana to manage 10+ clients and projects, earning $10K/month.
What's your highest-earning freelance gig as a single parent? #singleparenting #freelancework
